path: Problem: Sum values in a 2D table constrained by a date range on rows and a time range on columns

Action: LET + TRANSPOSE to orient headers as a filterable column; FILTER + INDEX to keep only columns whose time headers fall within bounds; DROP to remove header row; FILTER again to keep only rows whose date values fall within bounds; SUM to aggregate

Observation: When time headers are stored across columns, transposing converts them into a first-column field so they can be filtered with standard row-wise criteria; after filtering columns, a second filter can be applied by date to the remaining matrix
